reviews.comment:

Terrible service. NOW, DURING HOLIDAY SEASON, THEY WON'T ACCEPT DEBIT CARDS FOR FUEL!!! THEY ONLY ACCEPT CASH..... Dirty restrooms...

reviews.comment:
excelente lugar para parar, en el trayecto entre Trelew y Comodoro Rivadavia. Se puede cargar combustible y comprar alimentos, bebidas. Buenos precios

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop on the way between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia. You can fill up with fuel and buy food and drinks. Good prices.

reviews.comment:
Por la ubicacion de la estacion de servicio donde se encuentra, que es buena; tendria que Ser una estacion de servicio mas Grande y con mas surtidores, para evitar filas de espera y tener mas ventas... pero es un lindo Lugar en el sur. 😎

(Translated by Google)
Because of the location of the gas station, which is good, it should be a larger station with more pumps to avoid lines and increase sales... but it's a nice place in the south. 😎
